rows.label: qev050401_MSG0001
rows.name:
The duel is almost here...
Guh... There's no way I can win...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Why do I have to go through this
just because I want to live freely...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Hm? You there...
Are you an Earthling?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hey, do you have a minute?
I want to hear stories about NLA.
I absolutely love you Earthlings' city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_JNK0010
rows.name: Answer

rows.label: qev050401_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell him all sorts of things about NLA.

rows.label: qev050401_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev050401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask him why he is so interested in NLA.

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0005
rows.name: Thanks! You're a good person![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0006
rows.name:
So then... uh-huh, uh-huh.
...I see! The more I hear, the more stimulating
and incredible it sounds![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0007
rows.name:
Heh heh, it's just as I thought.
You see, I'm being kept trapped here by certain people,
so I haven't been able to go to NLA...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0068
rows.name:
Hearing your stories makes me yearn for it even more.
Such a bustling, stimulating city...
There wasn't a place like that anywhere on our homeworld![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0008
rows.name:
You're curious about that?
Earthlings really do have an appetite for everything, don't they.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0009
rows.name:
I heard about it from my friends who have been to NLA.
About your city...
About how it offers a freedom that doesn't exist here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ever since then, I've just been imagining what kind of place
it must be from inside this cave.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0011
rows.name:
It's surely not an unadorned place like a Larsian city,
but a bustling, stimulating, wonderful place
filled with surprises every day, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0012
rows.name:
Ahh... So jealous!
I really want to try living in a place like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0013
rows.name:
Then, I'll earn money working a carefree BLADE job,
without any Larsian obligations tying me down,
and live freely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0014
rows.name:
Ah, come to think of it, what kind of work do you do?
Judging from your build,
you look like you're quite capable...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_JNK0030
rows.name: Honest

rows.label: qev050401_SEL0031
rows.name: Honestly state that you are a BLADE.

rows.label: qev050401_JNK0040
rows.name: Argue

rows.label: qev050401_SEL0041
rows.name: Retort that being a BLADE is not such an easy job.

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Wait, you're a BLADE?!
Seriously... Now I feel even more
of a fateful connection...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0016
rows.name:
My bad, my bad!
I didn't mean it like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0017
rows.name:
But unlike the loyalty-obsessed Lars, I get the feeling
you all do it entirely of your own free will.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Wait, you're a BLADE?!
Seriously... Now I feel even more
of a fateful connection...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0019
rows.name:
Alright...
Say, BLADEs are a mercenary group that even takes requests
from aliens, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0020
rows.name:
Would you be willing to take a request from me?
I've... well, been challenged to a duel
by a certain Larsian...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0021
rows.name:
And those people are ridiculously strong.
There's no way I could possibly hold my own against them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0022
rows.name:
So, I want you to act as my proxy
and defeat them for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0023
rows.name:
Haaah! Thank goodness!
Because those people are, well...
incredibly angry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0024
rows.name:
If I went myself, they might seriously
beat me half to death...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_JNK0050
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev050401_SEL0051
rows.name: Tell him it's going to be okay and reassure him.

rows.label: qev050401_JNK0060
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev050401_SEL0061
rows.name:
Ask him in detail about the circumstances
that led to this situation.

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0025
rows.name:
...At a time like this, a Larsian would tell me
to fight my own duel even if it kills me.
I really do prefer Earthlings like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0026
rows.name:
Well, my opponent isn't a completely terrible person,
so just try to defeat them without causing any serious injuries...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0027
rows.name:
Uhhh...
It's a bit complicated, so I can't really talk about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0028
rows.name:
Please, come on!
Some things are better left unsaid, right?
For now, just focus on the duel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0029
rows.name:
Though... well, my opponent isn't a completely terrible person,
so just try to defeat them without causing any serious injuries...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0030
rows.name:
At the very end, just tell them:
"De Ezich is now free."
That will settle everything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0041
rows.name:
They are very angry, so they might spout some nonsense.
So... just ignore whatever they say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0042
rows.name:
Just win the duel and declare:
"De Ezich is now free."
That's all you need to do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0043
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, alright?
Now, head to the White Tree Continent.
And absolutely make sure you win.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0044
rows.name:
Yes!!
Now I am truly free!
Man, it really feels like justice prevails![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0045
rows.name:
...Heh, my old man and my mom,
they let themselves be too bound by things like
being Larsian and serving Ga Derg-sama![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0046
rows.name:
Loyalty? Bravery? Pride? To hell with all that!
Give me booze! Gambling! Women!
As long as I'm having fun right now, who cares?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0047
rows.name:
Alright! Starting today, I'm going to mingle with the Earthlings
and do whatever the hell I want!
The Lars can go rot for all I care![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0048
rows.name:
Hey, [ST:playername ]!
I'll be heading off to NLA ahead of you, alright?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050401_SEL0091
rows.name: Let De Ezich go as he pleases.

rows.label: qev050401_JNK0100
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev050401_SEL0101
rows.name: Scold the arrogant and reckless De Ezich.

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0049
rows.name:
Farewell, stifling days with the Lars!
I'll give you your reward once we're over there,
so let's meet up in NLA later, my savior![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0050
rows.name:
Wha... What's wrong all of a sudden?
Why is an Earthling like you getting angry?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0051
rows.name:
The way we Lars live must seem stifling
and abnormal to you, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0052
rows.name:
...What?
It makes far more sense
than my nonsense excuses?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0053
rows.name:
Guh... You're going to lecture me now...?
Does that mean you're exactly the same kind of person
as my old man and my mom...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0054
rows.name:
You traitor... Damn it all!
Fine, then I'll defeat you and claim my freedom!
I'll show you that I can fight when I have to![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0055
rows.name:
Earthlings are amazing...
To build a city like this, separated by only a single wall
from a barren wasteland crawling with native creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0056
rows.name:
Even while carrying a sense of duty,
everyone lives freely and joyfully in their own way.
I... I'm really glad I left that cave.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_JNK0110
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050401_SEL0111
rows.name: Smile and tell him to enjoy his freedom.

rows.label: qev050401_JNK0120
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev050401_SEL0121
rows.name: Remind him that NLA has its own fair share of hardships.

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0057
rows.name:
Freedom! What a wonderful word!
From now on, I'm not living for Ga Derg-sama,
nor to protect Larsian pride.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0058
rows.name:
Your words carry a lot of weight...
You seem to have been through a lot of hardships.
What exactly happened in this city?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0059
rows.name:
I don't fully understand the deeper issues yet,
but I'll take my time and learn about them properly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0060
rows.name:
Well, anyway, freedom is great!
It's not for Ga Derg-sama,
and it's not to protect Larsian pride![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0061
rows.name:
I can live for myself!
If I were still with the Lars, they'd probably mock
this way of life as shallow and disgraceful, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0062
rows.name:
This is what true happiness is!
And no matter what happens because of it,
I'll take it head-on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050401_MSG0063
rows.name:
...Here, your reward!
Heh heh, I sold off my sword earlier,
and it fetched quite a good price.[ST:wait ]
